description_long: This object is a futuristic or stylized shotgun with a robust, industrial design. The body is composed of segmented, cylindrical barrels with visible seams and rivet-like details, suggesting reinforced construction. The grip is angular and ergonomically shaped, with a pronounced curve and a textured appearance for secure handling. The shotgun features a double-barrel configuration, with both barrels aligned side by side and extending the full length of the weapon. There is a prominent trigger guard and a visible trigger mechanism beneath the barrels, as well as a rail or rib structure along the top. The coloration is a mix of muted blue, green, and purple tones, with some yellow and red highlights, giving it a weathered, utilitarian look.
description: A stylized, double-barrel shotgun with a segmented, reinforced body and an angular, ergonomic grip. The surface features muted blue-green tones with industrial detailing and a prominent trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the double barrels, the curved grip, and the segmented, reinforced body.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the symmetry of the shotgun's design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same double-barrel structure and grip, with visible detailing along the body.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrels, with the rib structure visible on top.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with visible ribbing along the top and equal barrel lengths
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a reinforced appearance and no visible finger grooves
